top_signals.title: The teenagers enlisted as agents of mayhem by Russia and Iran
top_signals.summary: Minors are being targeted to carry out hostile acts from Ukraine to western Europe and Israel
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese, Hong Kong Investors Banned from SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Underwriters on SpaceX’s $75 billion initial public offering have been told not to accept orders from investors in Hong Kong and China, due to regulatory and compliance risks related to US restrictions around the export of critical technology. Benedikt Kammel reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of Japan expected to raise rates this month, sources say - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Bank of Japan expected to raise rates this month, sources say  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How much value is AI really creating?
top_signals.summary: Eye-opening changes to the speed and volume of work are not always translating into genuine productivity
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why Investors are Spooked by Indonesia's Markets
top_signals.summary:
Spooked investors are fleeing from Indonesian markets as the country's credibility problem mounts.

Ruth Carson looks at why the rupiah, Indonesian stocks and bonds are getting hammered — and what it takes to course correct.  (Source: Bloomberg)
